Package com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration

  • Interface Summary 
    Interface Description
    AuthorizeCard.AuthorizeCallback
    Call back from POS Service for authorize card command
    AuthorizeCard.AuthorizeCurrentStepCallback
    Callback for the one step of authorize card procedure.
    AuthorizeCard.EnterPinCallBack  
    FullIntegrationBase.BaseEnterPinCallback  
    FullIntegrationBase.BaseEnterSecurityCallback  
    FullIntegrationBase.CommunicateFinishCallback  
    FullIntegrationBase.CurrentStepCallback
    Callback for the one step of the whole procedure.
    FullIntegrationBase.FatCurrentStepCallback  
    GetPINBlock.EnterPinCallBack  
    GetPINBlock.GetPINBlockCallback
    Call back from POS Service for get PIN block command
    InputAccount.CardEventListener
    Listener for Card Event.
    InputAccount.EnterSecurityCallBack  
    InputAccount.InputAccountCallback
    Call back from POS Service for input account command.
    InputAccount.InputCardNumCallback  
    InputAccount.ProcessingMessageUpdateCallback
    Used to indicate the processing message change
    InputAccount.ReportStatusListener
    Interface definition for a callback to be invoked when terminal reported integer status.
    RemoveCard.RemoveCardCallback
    Call back from POS Service for remove card command
  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    AuthorizeCard
    This is used to communicate with POS Service to authorize card.
    Only supports Full Integration app (P2PE or TermLink)
    AuthorizeCard.AuthorizeRequest
    The request data for Authorize Card command.
    AuthorizeCard.AuthorizeResponse
    The response data of Authorize.
    AuthorizeCard.EnterPinCallBackExpand
    The extended class of EnterPinCallBack
    CheckFile
    This is used to communicate with POS Service to CheckFile.
    Cross compatible with Semi and Full Integration BroadPOS apps
    CheckFile.CheckFileRequest  
    CheckFile.CheckFileResponse  
    CompleteOnlineEMV
    This is used to communicate with POS Service to CompleteOnlineEMV.
    Only supports Full Integration app (P2PE or TermLink)
    CompleteOnlineEMV.CompleteOnlineEMVRequest  
    CompleteOnlineEMV.CompleteOnlineEMVResponse  
    EMVTLVData
    This is used to communicate with POS Service to get/set EMV TLV data.
    Only supports Full Integration app (P2PE or TermLink)
    EMVTLVData.GetTLVRequest
    The request data for GetTLV command.
    EMVTLVData.GetTLVResponse
    The response data of GetTLV command
    EMVTLVData.SetTLVRequest
    The request data for SetTLV command.
    EMVTLVData.SetTLVResponse
    The response data of SetTLV command
    FullIntegrationBase  
    GetPINBlock
    Input PIN and calculate pin block.
    Only supports Full Integration app (P2PE or TermLink)
    GetPINBlock.EnterPinCallBackExpand
    The extended class of EnterPinCallBack
    GetPINBlock.GetPINBlockRequest  
    GetPINBlock.GetPINBlockResponse  
    Init
    This is used to communicate with POS Service to init.
    Cross compatible with Semi and Full Integration BroadPOS apps
    Init.InitResponse  
    InputAccount
    This is used to communicate with service to read account information.
    Only supports Full Integration app (P2PE or TermLink)
    InputAccount.CustomMACInformation  
    InputAccount.InputAccountCallbackCompat
    This class is an abstract class that implements InputAccountCallback.
    InputAccount.InputAccountRequest
    The request data for input account command.
    InputAccount.InputAccountResponse
    The response data of input account command.
    InputAccount.InputAccountResponse.CustomMACInfo  
    InputAccount.InputAreaParams  
    RemoveCard
    This is used to communicate with POS Service to warn remove card.
    Only supports Full Integration app (P2PE or TermLink)
    RemoveCard.RemoveCardRequest
    The request data for RemoveCard command.
    RemoveCard.RemoveCardResponse
    The response data of RemoveCard command.
    TerminalConfiguration
    Some configuration for Terminal
    UpdateResource
    This is used to communicate with POS Service to update resource files of BroadPOS.
    UpdateResource.UpdateResourceRequest  
    UpdateResource.UpdateResourceResponse  
    Variable
    This is used to communicate with POS Service to get/set Variable.
    Variable.GetVariableRequest  
    Variable.GetVariableResponse  
    Variable.SetVariableRequest  
    Variable.SetVariableResponse  
    VasPushData
    This is used to communicate with POS Service to configure the parameters of Google SmartTap to push data from terminal to mobile, such as merchant info.
    Cross compatible with Semi and Full Integration BroadPOS apps
    VasPushData.GoogleSmartTapPushService  
    VasPushData.GoogleSmartTapPushService.NewService  
    VasPushData.GoogleSmartTapPushService.ServiceUpdate  
    VasPushData.GoogleSmartTapPushService.ServiceUsage  
    VasPushData.VasPushDataRequest  
    VasPushData.VasPushDataResponse  
    VasSetMerchantParameters
    This is used to communicate with POS Service to configure the parameters of Apple VAS or Google SmartTap.
    Cross compatible with Semi and Full Integration BroadPOS apps
    VasSetMerchantParameters.ApplePayVAS  
    VasSetMerchantParameters.GoogleSmartTap  
    VasSetMerchantParameters.VasSetMerchantParametersRequest  
    VasSetMerchantParameters.VasSetMerchantParametersResponse
